7.2 MICROBIOLOGY RESULT RELEASE

In MADCAP every test has a specific test type number. Microbiology test numbers are listed in Appendix
13.2.1 Microbiology Test Codes.

7.2.1 COLIFORM AND THERMODURIC RELEASING (020)

Test Type Test Type Number
BactoScan 2

APC/SPC 3

Coliform 4

Pseudomonas 24
48/72 Hour Screening 25
